prestazioni: Engine: Ford EcoBoost 2.3L *GTD-4204* (I4, direct-injection, turbocharged) – Full built internals with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 CR), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 35 psi boost capability. Upgraded valvetrain with Ferrea titanium intake/exhaust valves, Supertech dual valve springs, and Comp Cams custom camshafts (280° duration, 0.550" lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4" titanium downpipe and Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate. Paired with a PTP 4" silicone intake system and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup to manage crankcase pressure under extreme boost (targeting 850 whp on E85).

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 3-way adjustable coilovers with 24-position rebound/compression damping, custom-valved for the S1’s aluminum-intensive chassis. Full polybushings from SuperPro (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) with spherical bearings at all suspension pickup points. AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted) and Ferodo DS3000 pads for endurance track use.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Saleen Racing (Track Pack-specific), featuring a 3-piece front splitter with adjustable dive planes, a 2-stage rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts, and a fixed carbon rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord) with Gurney flap and swan-neck mounts for 400+ lbs of downforce at 150 mph. All aero surfaces are CFD-optimized for the S1’s mid-engine layout.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green wrap with satin black accents, including custom laser-cut vinyl overlays for the OEM carbon fiber hood and roof. HRE FF10 3-piece forged wheels (19x11" front, 20x13" rear) in a matte bronze finish, shod with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 335/30 rear). Sequential LED turn signals integrated into the side mirrors (Lux Automotive retrofit).

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with custom embroidered Saleen logos. MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display (12.3", configurable for lap times, boost, and oil temps). Rear bulkhead delete with a custom aluminum roll cage (TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) and a fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, plumbed to all critical zones).
